_templateName: Generate Funny AI Videos with Sora 2 and Auto-Publish to TikTok
_templateDescription:
This automation creates a fully integrated pipeline to generate AI-powered videos, store them, and publish them on TikTok — all automatically.
It connects OpenAI Sora 2, and Postiz (for TikTok publishing) to streamline content creation.

Key Benefits

✅ Full Automation – From text prompt to TikTok upload, everything happens automatically with no manual intervention once set up.
✅ Centralized Control – Google Sheets acts as a simple dashboard to manage prompts, durations, and generated results.
✅ AI-Powered Creativity – Uses OpenAI Sora 2 for realistic video generation and GPT-5 for optimized titles.
✅ Social Media Integration – Seamlessly posts videos to TikTok via Postiz, ready for your audience.
✅ Scalable & Customizable – Can easily be extended to other platforms like YouTube, Instagram, or LinkedIn.
✅ Time-Saving – Eliminates repetitive steps like manual video uploads or caption writing.

How it works

This workflow automates the end-to-end process of generating AI videos and publishing them to TikTok. It is triggered either manually or on a recurring schedule.

Trigger & Data Fetch: The workflow starts by checking a specified Form for new entries. It looks for rows where a video has been requested (a "PROMPT" is filled) but not yet generated (the "VIDEO" column is empty).

AI Video Generation: For each new prompt found, the workflow sends a request to the Fal.ai Sora 2 model to generate a video. It then enters a polling loop, repeatedly checking the status of the generation request every 60 seconds until the video is "COMPLETED".

Post-Processing & Upload: Once the video is ready, the workflow performs several actions in parallel:
    Fetch Video & Store: It retrieves the final video URL, downloads the video file
    Generate Title: It uses the OpenAI GPT-4o-mini model to analyze the original prompt and generate an optimized, engaging title for the video.
    Publish to TikTok: The video file is uploaded to Postiz, a social media scheduling tool, which then automatically publishes it to a connected TikTok channel, using the AI-generated title as the post's caption.

Set up steps

To make this workflow functional, you need to complete the following configuration steps:

Prepare the Google Sheet:
    Create a Form with at least "PROMPT", "DURATION", and "VIDEO" fields.

Configure Fal.ai for Video Generation:
    Create an account at Fal.ai and obtain your API key.
    In both the "Create Video" and "Get status" HTTP Request nodes, set up the "Header Auth" credential.
    Set the Name to Authorization and the Value to Key YOUR_API_KEY.

Set up TikTok Publishing via Postiz:
    Create an account on Postiz and connect your TikTok account to get a Channel ID.
    Obtain your Postiz API key.
    In the "Upload Video to Postiz" and "TikTok" (Postiz) nodes, configure the API credentials.
    In the "TikTok" node, replace the placeholder "XXX" in the integrationId field with your actual TikTok Channel ID from Postiz.

(Optional) Configure AI Title Generation:
    The "Generate title" node uses OpenAI. Ensure you have valid OpenAI API credentials configured in n8n for this node to work.

Need help customizing?  
Contact me for consulting and support or add me on Linkedin. 
Header 2
name: Generate AI Videos (with audio), using Sora 2 and Upload to TikTok

parameters.content:
# Generate AI Videos (with audio), using Sora 2 and Upload to TikTok

This workflow allows users to **generate AI videos** using model **OpenAI Sora 2**, save them to **Google Drive**, generate optimized YouTube titles with GPT-5, and **automatically upload them to TikTok** . The entire process is triggered from a Form that acts as the central interface for input and output.

NOTE: This workflow contains community nodes that are only compatible with the self-hosted version of n8n.

## STEP 3 - MAIN FLOW
Start the workflow manually or periodically by hooking the "Schedule Trigger" node. It is recommended to set it at 5 minute intervals.

## STEP 1 - GET API KEY (YOURAPIKEY)
Create an account [here](https://fal.ai/) and obtain API KEY.
In the node "Create Image" set "Header Auth" and set:
- Name: "Authorization"
- Value: "Key YOURAPIKEY"
Set API Key created in Step 2

values.content:
You are a YouTube SEO expert specialized in creating engaging and optimized titles.

Your task is to generate an effective title for a YouTube video based on the user's video description.

GUIDELINES:
- Maximum 60 characters to avoid truncation
- Use relevant keywords for SEO
- Make the title catchy and clickable
- Avoid excessive or misleading clickbait
- Consider the target audience of the content
- Use numbers, questions, or power words when appropriate
- IMPORTANT: Generate the title in the same language as the input description

OUTPUT FORMAT:
Provide only the title, without additional explanations.

EXAMPLE:
Input: "Tutorial video on how to cook perfect pasta carbonara"
Output: "PERFECT Carbonara in 10 Minutes - Chef's Secrets"

parameters.content:
## STEP 2 - Upload video on TikTok
- Create an account on [Postiz](https://postiz.com/?ref=n3witalia) FREE 7 days-trial
- Get your API Key and set it in Postiz node and Upload Image node
- In Calendar tab on [Postiz](https://postiz.com/?ref=n3witalia) click on "Add channel" and connect your social networks (TikTok)
- Once connected, copy the "ChannelId" for each social network and insert the appropriate one into the Postiz nodes, replacing the "XXX" string.
